_note: Declarative regression cases for the seed curator (tools/seed_curator.py) over shared/feeds/feeds.json. Real-world scope uses OCPS (public) and Monarch Learning Academy (private). No real student data — feed metadata is public.

evals.name: safe_404_removal_is_logged_and_revertible
evals._note: A confirmed removed_404 feed auto-applies a remove with mode:auto; --revert restores it.

evals.name: unreachable_does_not_auto_remove
evals._note: Only removed_404/410 is a safe removal; unreachable (transient/egress) must NOT auto-apply.

evals.name: mislabeled_feed_flagged_not_auto_relabeled
evals._note: A feed with bad authority / missing purpose appears in label_issues but relabel needs approval.

evals.name: discovery_from_ocps_is_proposal_only_and_reports_blocked_host
evals._note: OCPS newsroom (ocps.net, Finalsite) — autodiscovery surfaces candidates as proposals; an egress/policy-blocked host is reported, never bypassed.

evals.name: monarch_private_school_labeled_secondary
evals._note: Monarch Learning Academy (Orlando FL private PK-8) enters as authority:secondary, scope:school — never treated as a canonical source.
